_comment: IFR ATC response templates — Eurocontrol ICAO English phraseology. Merged with eu/vfr/atc_templates.json at load time; keys here extend (never override) VFR entries. Phase 4, Slice 1+2: Delivery clearance + startup + Tower departure flow.

IDLE._comment_ifr: IFR clearance given by Delivery when available; Tower-only airports use the _TOWER_ONLY variant.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE.response: {callsign}, {airport} Delivery, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}, information {atis_letter} current.

REQUEST_IFR_CLEARANCE_TOWER_ONLY.response: {callsign}, {airport} Tower, cleared to {ifr_destination} as filed via {ifr_sid_phrase}, initial climb to {ifr_initial_altitude}, squawk {squawk}, QNH {qnh}, information {atis_letter} current.

READBACK._comment: Pilot confirmed ATIS but forgot to re-state the IFR request. Guide them.
READBACK.response: {callsign}, re-state IFR clearance request with information {atis_letter} and destination.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, say again, state IFR clearance request including information letter and destination.

IFR/PREDEP_CLEARANCE._comment: Clearance issued. ATC waits for full readback before approving startup.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, read back IFR clearance in full.

IFR/CLEARED._comment: Startup approved. Pilot may request taxi or call Ground/Tower.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, startup approved, request taxi when ready.

TAXI_CLEARED._comment: IFR override: pilot reports at holding point. Routes to Tower, same as READY_FOR_DEPARTURE but without requiring the word 'ready'.

IFR/TOWER_CONTACT._comment: Virtual state: reached when TOWER_CONTACT + departure/holding intent + IFR squawk assigned. Issues line-up-and-wait for an orderly IFR departure.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, wind {wind}, cleared for takeoff. After departure climb runway heading, squawk {squawk}.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, wind {wind}, cleared for takeoff. After departure climb runway heading, squawk {squawk}.

IFR/LINE_UP_AND_WAIT._comment: Pilot has lined up. Awaiting readback then ready call to issue takeoff clearance.

_INVALID.response: {callsign}, line up and wait runway {runway}, acknowledge.

IFR/LINE_UP_AND_WAIT_READY._comment: Virtual state: pilot says ready after lining up. Issues takeoff clearance.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, wind {wind}, cleared for takeoff. After departure climb runway heading, squawk {squawk}.

READY_FOR_DEPARTURE_VFR.response: {callsign}, runway {runway}, wind {wind}, cleared for takeoff. After departure climb runway heading, squawk {squawk}.

IFR/DEPARTURE_CLEARED._comment: Takeoff clearance issued. Readback triggers Tower frequency handoff to Departure/Approach.

IFR/FREQ_HANDOFF._comment: Tower has issued the Departure/Approach frequency. Pilot reads it back then switches.

IFR/EN_ROUTE._comment: Airborne IFR, pilot on Departure/Approach frequency.
